rulings.Case Title: MARY LYONS VS. METROPOLITAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Cyprus Amax Minerals Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion For Bifurcation Of Successor Liability Issue
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for January 5, 2017, Thursday, in Department 503, Line 3. Defendant Cyprus Amax Minerals Company's motion for bifurcation of successor liability issue is continued on the court's own motion to January 11, 2017. Pursuant to Local Rule 2.7(B), defendant must deliver courtesy copies of both its moving papers and its reply to Department 503 by January 5, 2017 at 4:00p.m. The Court reiterates its ruling provided at the November 23, 2016 ex parte hearing that this is a matter for the trial judge. =(503/GLW)
